subject: docs(ai-notes): fix cross-repo access to use GitHub API with token
body:
Use GITHUB_ALL_REPO_TOKEN via printenv (not shell expansion) with the
GitHub API instead of raw.githubusercontent.com URLs. Documents the
correct pattern for reading files from sibling devmade-ai repos.

Tags: documentation, ai-notes
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: cors-management
Semver: patch
